requirement_attributes.article_title: Classification of ICT-related incidents and cyber threats

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall classify ICT-related incidents and shall determine their impact based on criteria such as the number of clients affected, duration, geographical spread, data losses, and criticality of the services affected.
